nasb.text: He bought the piece of land where he had pitched his tent from the hand of the sons of Hamor, Shechem’s father, for one hundred pieces of money.

esv.text: And from the sons of Hamor, Shechem’s father, he bought for a hundred pieces of money the piece of land on which he had pitched his tent.

cnv.text: 他支搭帳棚的那塊地，是他用一百塊銀子向示劍的父親哈抹的子孫買來的。

ccb.text: 他搭营居住的这块地是他用一百块银子向示剑的父亲哈抹的子孙买的。

csbs.text: 他用一百块银子，从示剑的父亲哈抹的儿子们手中买下了这块支搭帐篷的地。
